title: agent-browser service status response
description: Stable API shape for service status responses returned by CLI JSON and HTTP service APIs.

waiting_profile_lease_job_count.description: Number of retained service jobs currently waiting for profile lease release.

service_monitor_interval_ms.description: Background interval in milliseconds for enqueuing due active service monitor checks. Null means disabled.

profileAllocations.description: Derived service-owned profile allocation view for session holders and waiting profile-lease jobs.

launchConfig.description: No-launch diagnostic view of the configured browser build and executable path that service-owned requests would inherit.

defaultBrowserBuild.description: Configured service.defaultBrowserBuild value, or null when stock Chrome remains the default posture.

stealthCdpChromiumRequired.description: True when the service default or at least one site policy selects stealthcdp_chromium.

stealthCdpChromiumReady.description: True when stealthcdp_chromium is not selected, or it has a configured executable path that exists.

executablePath.description: Resolved executablePath from config, AGENT_BROWSER_EXECUTABLE_PATH, or a browser build manifest.

executablePathSource.description: Source of the resolved executablePath: env, config, manifest, or null when auto-discovery remains in use.

executablePathExists.description: Whether the resolved executablePath exists as a file. Null means no explicit executable path is configured.

browserBuildManifests.description: Resolved browser-build manifest diagnostics keyed by browser build id, such as stealthcdp_chromium.
